feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: given a budget of 50-100 USD / month which LLM subscription is worth it the most…
entry.content: given a budget of 50-100 USD / month which LLM subscription is worth it the most right now? use cases general purpose questions and dabbling in programming

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why is this shit so insanely difficult to get working correctly on a NAS? I've s…
entry.content: Why is this shit so insanely difficult to get working correctly on a NAS? I've spent 2 hours now just trying to set up Recyclarr on my Synology NAS it's basically impossible. Permissions errors everywhere despite the fact that folder permissions are set correctly, and AI just gives me fake hallucinated fixes that don't actually work. Meanwhile anything from the Synology package center just works perfectly with a one click install. Also, why the fuck do I even need yet another service running jus

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Physical has been dead for years
entry.content: If gabe died and steam started fucking everyone over and we all lost our game libraries, everyone would pirate from there on out. If game platforms actually started using the "you dont actually own your games, you license them" clause, the gaming industry would die over night. It would break everyones shackles and they would start pirating. Steam could never just take your games unless they are trying to ruin their entire business. There are a few games here and there that will fuck you over but

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is final fantasy a mainstream series?
entry.content: I feel like this franchise is no where near near as popular or well known with normies as it once was. Like the average gamer will have at best heard of final fantasy but definitely won’t have played a single one. It’s no where near the recognisability of your average western franchise like GTA or God of War. It’s well on its way to becoming an obscure weeb JRPG like tales or trails

entry.title: /mu/ Music: A Bigger Bang [Virgin, 2005] I'm obviously not to be trusted, since when I final…
entry.content: A Bigger Bang [Virgin, 2005] I'm obviously not to be trusted, since when I finally pulled out my vinyl on Dirty Work, which nobody else likes, I still loved its booming Steve Lillywhite Charlie, its studious chicken-scratch Keith, its bitterness and cynicism and spiritual desperation. On this one desperation is in remission. But despite its lack of an anthem to replace "Start Me Up," it certainly beats Tattoo You or anything else going back to Exile except Some Girls. Long the weak link, Mick--c

entry.title: /int/ International: Rate my poem.
entry.content: little american worker. You spend your life like a new yorker. Eating goyslop while you sob. Day after day, night after night. Eating, drinking, consuming. Like a good cattle, which you don't realize it's your own mental battle. But you're unable, to understand the fable. Of your tiny destiny. Unable to put on your table, enough food for your kids. Which you will sent to die and be eaten by tics. In some faraway land. Forever and ever you say whatsoever, whatever you say, chud. But the real real

This is 100% done on purpose, so why is it that videogames are not banned for children yet? Letting children play videogames is like letting them play casino. https://strawpoll.com/jVyG2Gj89Z7

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why do people say that LLMs are basically just search engines?
entry.content: I've been asking stuff to Gemini and it's clear to me that it ''reasons'', he understands the context of the issues I'm presenting them which is something normal search engines don't Like for instance I was trying to add a custom shortcut to Gesturefy so that with a gesture it would find highlighted words on Google, however I had just copy pasted the google url in the search engine box on Gesturefy, Gemini deducted what the error was just by looking at a screenshot I provided it and told me how

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: NSFW art of my OC please
entry.content: I am new to how this works, and I know that it doesn’t make sense for me to ask for free art, but I’ve just been wanting to see others’ interpretations of what they see my characters doing. I’ll try to be around as much as I can, and thank you!

entry.content: Personal success and a sense of fulfilment are downstream of consistent righteous behaviour. Righteous behaviour is learned through studying the Word of God after being born into the family of God through faith in Jesus Christ. As per Jesus Christ: 31 Do not worry then, saying, ‘What will we eat?’ or ‘What will we drink?’ or ‘What will we wear for clothing?’ 32 For the Gentiles eagerly seek all these things; for your heavenly Father knows that you need all these things. 33 But seek first His kin

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2933
entry.content: >Statuesque Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8352 Hyper Preg Edition Previous Thread: >>83821148 F-li…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8352 Hyper Preg Edition Previous Thread: >>83821148 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profile

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Cab driver Stan slams into a homeless man who gets up and walks away, leaving b…
entry.content: >Cab driver Stan slams into a homeless man who gets up and walks away, leaving behind a scarf covered with writhing maggots. Obsessed with the mystery, Stan hunts the figure through the city, discovering a trail of mangled, half-eaten victims, and an urban legend: Puss Head was a sewer worker who came back from an uncharted tunnel changed into something both living and dead. Parents warn their children that the shuffling zombie will get them if they stay out on the streets too late. But as the b

entry.title: /o/ Auto: no AC
entry.content: you guys saved me last time i made a thread (it was the battery) so im gonna ask for help again my AC stopped blowing cold air. When I turn it on the car makes a loud humming noise that matches RPM. Additionally, the engine started making a constant loud fan noise that the car has never made (not 100% sure if these are correlated) i read that the AC clutch can fuck with the serpentine belt, maybe that's why there's extra noise from the engine?? And given the car has 49k i doubt its the compresso

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: The Drama
entry.content: Norwegian anon here. Being familiar with Kristoffer’s previous movies, this felt like it was written for Oslo and later changed to Boston with English-speaking actors. Did it give the same impression to Americans, or is life in Boston really like that?

How insulated with fat must you all be to want 68f when the perfect room temperature for summer shouldn't be freezing compared to outside.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: fenómeno psicológico en el que los juicios o decisiones de un individuo se ven i…
entry.content: fenómeno psicológico en el que los juicios o decisiones de un individuo se ven influenciados por un punto de referencia o "ancla", que puede ser completamente irrelevante. si se les da un ancla general de $20, las personas ajustarán sus decisiones en incrementos grandes ($19, $21, etc.), pero si se les da un ancla más específica como $19.85, las personas ajustarán sus decisiones en una escala menor ($19.75, $19.95, etc.).

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Jim Morrison died on this day 55 years ago
entry.content: >Of all creative bands in the history of rock music, the Doors may have been the most creative. Their first album contains only masterpieces and remains virtually unmatched. Jim Morrison may well be the single most important rock frontman. He is the one who defined the rock vocalist as an artist, not just a singer. Ray Manzarek's style at the keyboards was at the vanguard of the fusion of classical, jazz, soul and rock music. The virulence of some of their riffs bridged the blues-rock era and th
